arguments.expression: console.log('=== WebGL Support Test ==='); try { const canvas = document.createElement('canvas'); console.log('Canvas created:', !!canvas); console.log('Canvas getContext exists:', typeof canvas.getContext); const gl = canvas.getContext('webgl'); console.log('WebGL context type:', typeof gl); console.log('WebGL context created:', !!gl); if (gl) { console.log('WebGL constants - VERTEX_SHADER:', gl.VERTEX_SHADER); console.log('WebGL constants - FRAGMENT_SHADER:', gl.FRAGMENT_SHADER); console.log('WebGL constants - TRIANGLES:', gl.TRIANGLES); console.log('WebGL methods - createShader:', typeof gl.createShader); console.log('WebGL methods - createProgram:', typeof gl.createProgram); console.log('WebGL methods - getParameter:', typeof gl.getParameter); console.log('WebGL vendor:', gl.getParameter(7936)); console.log('WebGL renderer:', gl.getParameter(7937)); console.log('WebGL version:', gl.getParameter(7938)); const shader = gl.createShader(gl.VERTEX_SHADER); console.log('Created shader object:', !!shader); const program = gl.createProgram(); console.log('Created program object:', !!program); const buffer = gl.createBuffer(); console.log('Created buffer object:', !!buffer); } } catch (e) { console.log('❌ Error:', e.message); }
